title: Every Known Tropical Descent Theorem

analysis.object: T755: Every Known Tropical Descent Theorem depth analysis

mikhalkin_correspondence.description: Mikhalkin 2005: tropical curves correspond to classical curves in toric surfaces

payne_tropicalization.description: Payne 2009: tropicalization is a colimit of toric embeddings

gubler_rabinoff_werner.description: GRW 2016: analytification of X trop-retracts onto Berkovich skeleton

ulirsch_descent.description: Ulirsch: tropical Cartier divisors lift to Cartier divisors

common_mechanism.description: Common mechanism in all descent theorems: COMBINATORIAL RIGIDITY -- the tropical object is rigid enough to force lift
common_mechanism.reason: Discrete combinatorial structure forces uniqueness of lift

t755_pattern.description: T755: descent works when tropical object has rigid EML-0 combinatorial data. Fails when oscillatory EML-3 data needed.
t755_pattern.reason: Rigidity = EML-0. The pattern is the key.

analysis.theorem: T755: Every Known Tropical Descent Theorem (S1034).

key_theorem: T755: Every Known Tropical Descent Theorem (S1034).
